## SlicedFilters class

Component that slices a list of filters and returns them using the default scoped slot, allowing the user to show the full list of them or slicing them again using the show more/less buttons.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class SlicedFilters extends SlicedFilters_base 
```
<b>Extends:</b> SlicedFilters\_base

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [max](./x-components.slicedfilters.max.md) |  | number | The maximum number of filters to show. |
|  [showMoreFilters](./x-components.slicedfilters.showmorefilters.md) |  | boolean | For showing the remaining filters. |
